com.mentor.chs.plugin

Interface IXSystemContext

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXBaseContext, IXLanguageProvider, IXPrintServiceProvider, IXSymbolLibraryProvider

    public interface IXSystemContext
extends IXBaseContext
    IXSystemContext is the interface through which any custom task gets access to the general resources like project

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IXProject getProject(java.lang.String name)
      Fetches the project given a name.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXBaseContext

        createOptionExpressionParser, createOptionExpressionValidator, getDesignComparisonContext, getLibrary, getXHelper

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXLanguageProvider

        getLanguageManager

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPrintServiceProvider

        getPrintServices

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXSymbolLibraryProvider

        getSymbolLibraries

    • Method Detail

      • getProject

        IXProject getProject(java.lang.String name)
        Fetches the project given a name. Project name is case insensitive. This will open the project and provide access to the opened project Opening multiple projects through the custom task is not supported. If a second project is opened then API will throw a runtime exception
        Parameters:
        name - name of the project
        Returns:
        the project object, will return 'null' if no project exists with the given name.
